name: workflow closed-loop step feature-to-commit creates per-CL commits with the Decision trailer
command: mkdir -p repo && (cd repo && git init -q) && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/closed-loop-test.sh" --step feature-to-commit --root repo --decision-id 0001 --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'commit_trailer=Decision: 0001' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
